MOTION Notice Of Motion And Motion To Appoint Tawnya Carter As Successor-In-Interest;Leave To File First Amended Complaint;Mp&As; Decls Of David Donadio And Tawnya Carter
Off Calendar Feb-11-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Christopher Andreas, Esq., 415-989-1555, appeared on behalf of plaintiff and moving party Willie Carter.

There being no appearances in opposition to the motion, Plaintiffs' motion to appoint Tawnya Carter as successor-in-interest was granted. An order was signed in open court. (JJM) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
